title: picea jezoensis var. microsperma
intro: Picea jezoensis var. microsperma, also known as Korean red pine or Jeju black pine, is a variety of evergreen coniferous tree native to Korea and Japan. The medicinal properties of Picea jezoensis var. microsperma include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce stress, improve respiratory health, and even lower blood pressure. In herbal preparations, the needles and cones of Picea jezoensis var. microsperma are often used in traditional medicine to make teas, infusions, and tinctures.
